description: Seasonal service recommendations. Match today's date to the active season and suggest accordingly.

Valentines_Week.upsell_message: Valentine's is coming — make it unforgettable with a colour refresh or gorgeous nail art.

Easter_Week.upsell_message: Spring is here — treat yourself to a fresh facial and polished nails for Easter.

Summer_Season.upsell_message: Beach season is here — smooth skin and summer-ready nails are a must.

Wedding_Season.upsell_message: Wedding season is in full swing — look stunning for every celebration.

Halloween_Week.upsell_message: Halloween is around the corner — bold colours and dramatic nail art are trending right now.

Thanksgiving_Week.upsell_message: Look your best for Thanksgiving gatherings — a fresh facial or colour refresh makes all the difference.

Christmas_Week.upsell_message: Christmas is almost here — book now before slots fill up. Holiday nail art available!

NewYear_Week.upsell_message: New year, new look — start 2026 feeling incredible with a full glam package.
